title: Treats 'n' Sweets
description: A Minecraft datapack that adds lots of new foods under the theme of Treats 'n' Sweets!
body:
# Treats 'n' Sweets
 A Minecraft datapack that adds lots of new foods under the theme of Treats 'n' Sweets!
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ed1bf996-3803-4524-83c9-27c5427f3051)
Have you ever wished Minecraft had more sweet food items to choose from? Well, you're in luck! This datapack adds Ice Cream, Sundaes, Caramel Syrup, Lollipops, and more! Some of these items also have special effects that make them great additions to your toolkit as a Survival player.
# THIS PACK HAS A REQUIRED RESOURCE PACK!!!
![An image directing you to not directly download the datapack, but to double check for resources first.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/146472ebe8d7f5bc66a8429fe5d6c2c9d4d02940.png)

Please remember to download the resources too! If your food looks like music discs, ***you do not have the resource pack installed.***
